skills.name: render_hero_banner
skills.description: Generates a clean, conversion-first political hero header with deep green split layout, background image placeholder, dynamic text typography, and primary/secondary action buttons.
skills.pattern: Flex/Grid section containing Slogan (Not Words, But Actions Matter), Name (Samuel Mathai), Position Target (FOMAA Vice President Candidate 2026-2028), and dual-action buttons.

skills.name: render_metric_grid
skills.description: Transforms business, political, and charity statistics into high-impact, scannable structural grid cards.
skills.pattern: 3 or 4-column visual layout highlighting '25+ Years of Charity', '18+ Years Healthcare Business', '15+ Years Retail Industry', and 'DMA/FOMAA Leadership Milestones'.

skills.name: render_accordion_or_tabs_platform
skills.description: Renders Samuel Mathai's core initiatives and future provisions into cleanly toggled sections to avoid visual clutter.
skills.pattern: Interactive categories for Youth Empowerment, Women Entrepreneurship, Senior Care Mission, and Cultural Infrastructure.

skills.name: render_compliant_campaign_footer
skills.description: Constructs a legally compliant political website footer featuring social hooks, placeholder newsletter intake, and a distinct bordered FEC-style disclaimer block.
skills.pattern: Bordered center-aligned disclaimer text reading '[PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE PLACEHOLDER]'
